changes: AstrBot promoted its beta into stable v4.23.0 on 2026-04-12 16:38 UTC.
SwarmClaw kept shipping fast follow-ups on 2026-04-12, reaching v1.5.40.
PicoClaw posted another nightly build on 2026-04-13 01:01 UTC, while stable remains v0.2.6.
Hermes Agent still has no new release since v2026.4.8, and the broader atlas structure is unchanged today.
whyItMatters: OpenClaw remains the pacing project, and another beta this quickly suggests the anchor product is still in a rapid release loop.
AstrBot converting beta into stable matters because the broader IM-native agent layer is not just experimenting, it is shipping production releases.
SwarmClaw's release burst reinforces that the orchestration and control-plane lane is still active around the OpenClaw ecosystem.
PicoClaw's nightly cadence continues to validate the low-resource edge lane as a live competitive direction.
Net: this was a material day-level update, but it does not change the stable strategic thesis yet.
